name: Potential Exfiltration of Stored Credentials from Browsers
notes: This rule detects potential exfiltration of credentials stored in browsers.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware Hashes SHA', "SHA256 Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware Hashes SHA', "SHA1 Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs', sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs', destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malicious URLs', "URL") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malicious URLs', "URL Host") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Exfiltration of Stored Credentials from Browsers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware Hashes SHA', "SHA256 Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware Hashes SHA', "SHA1 Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs', sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs', destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malicious URLs', "URL") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malicious URLs', "URL Host") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Exfiltration of Stored Credentials from Browsers
Event description: Detects potential exfiltration of credentials stored in browsers.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using ProcessName (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
